name: Setup Test Project in Zitadel
description: Creates a test project with roles, a human test user, and a machine user in Zitadel. Requires the ephemeral admin PAT (must run before hardening step 360). Stores test credentials in /bootstrap/test-oidc.json for downstream OIDC checks.

parameters.name: Setup Test Project
parameters.description: Set to true to create a test project, test user, and machine user in Zitadel.

parameters.name: Domain Suffix
parameters.description: Domain suffix for constructing external URLs
